This is a testharness.js-based test.

  assert_own_property: interface object missing static operation expected property "fromURL" missing
[FAIL] Origin interface: calling fromURL(USVString) on new Origin() with too few arguments must throw TypeError
  assert_own_property: interface object must have static operation as own property expected property "fromURL" missing
Harness: the test ran to completion.
